prompt: Which vulnerability is most likely present in this code?

options.text: Use of a Broken or Risky Cryptographic Algorithm
Information Exposure Through an Error Message

explanation: A credential (`DB_PASSWORD`) is embedded directly in source, so anyone with the code or compiled binary obtains it and it cannot be rotated without a redeploy — Use of Hard-coded Credentials (CWE-798). Fix: load it at runtime from an environment variable or a secrets manager and keep it out of version control.
source_reference: CWE-798; OWASP A07:2021 (Identification and Authentication Failures)
